creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=06cd6053765d00445084010fd67ad6944c2911ba

commit 06cd6053765d00445084010fd67ad6944c2911ba
Author:     Ralf van der Enden <tremere@cainites.net>
AuthorDate: 2024-06-12 07:13:06 +0000
Commit:     Fernando Apesteguía <fernape@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2024-06-14 06:31:26 +0000

    dns/powerdns-recursor: update to 5.0.6

    ChangeLog: https://blog.powerdns.com/2024/06/05/powerdns-recursor-5-0-6-released

     * YaHTTP: Enforce max # of request fields and max request line size.
     * Report error and adjust max-mthreads when linux map limit (vm.max_map_count)
       is too low to accomodate resource usage under load.

    PR:             279619
    Reported by:    tremere@cainites.net (maintainer)

 dns/powerdns-recursor/Makefile | 3 +--
 dns/powerdns-recursor/distinfo | 6 +++---
 2 files changed, 4 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-)
